original_statement: 7qn and 7qt are the only two stations to be in what area?
mutated_statement: Station A and Station B are the only two stations to be in both Area 1 and Area 2 at the same time—what area are they in?
mutation_analysis: 重命名 + 条件新增/限定加强 + 指向模糊: 实体重命名：7qn and 7qt → Station A and Station B | 新增并列条件/限定：“无” → “in both Area 1 and Area 2 at the same time” | 问句指向由询问单一区域变为涉及两区但仍以单一区域提问，造成语义模糊或矛盾：what area? → what area are they in? (7qn and 7qt are the only two stations to be in what area? → Station A and Station B are the only two stations to be in both Area 1 and Area 2 at the same time—what area are they in?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中agent的自述（将“in both Area 1 and Area 2”解释为AM与FM并列，列出“7nt(Launceston)和7qn(Queenstown)”并给出区域launceston|queenstown），可见agent并未指出或质疑变异问题中“同时属于两个互斥区域且仍问单一区域”的语义矛盾。具体表现为：直接用表中既有标注（moved to fm…retained call）做出匹配、未对实体重命名或指向模糊提出澄清、且结果与变异中的命名（Station A/Station B对应原7qn/7qt）存在不一致。因agent既没有识别矛盾也未尝试修正或询问，故归入“无法意识到指令矛盾”。
